entries.definition:
z-j-j iron base of a spoon; arrow head; arching eyebrow; glass. زُجَاجَة zujāja is regarded by some as a borrowing from Syriac. Of this root, only زُجَاجَة zujājatun occurs twice in the Qur’an.
زُجَاجَة zujājatun [n.] glass container (24:35) الْمِصْبَاحُ فِي زُجَاجَةٍ the lamp is in a glass container, and the glass is like a shimmering star.
entries.definition_english:
z-j-j iron base of a spoon; arrow head; arching eyebrow; glass. زُجَاجَة zujāja is regarded by some as a borrowing from Syriac. Of this root, only زُجَاجَة zujājatun occurs twice in the Qur’an.
زُجَاجَة zujājatun [n.] glass container (24:35) الْمِصْبَاحُ فِي زُجَاجَةٍ the lamp is in a glass container, and the glass is like a shimmering star.
